BearExpansion.promotion_requirement: signed negative expansion root target passes 95 gate directly and is separated from CrisisStress

BullExpansion.promotion_requirement: signed positive expansion root target passes 95 gate directly across contexts/timeframes

Consolidation.promotion_requirement: root-level consolidation target passes 95 gate directly

CrisisStress.promotion_requirement: tail/stress root target passes 95 gate directly across contexts/timeframes

TransitionRecovery.contract_state: optional root until downstream consumer explicitly requires it
TransitionRecovery.promotion_requirement: transition/recovery target passes 95 gate directly with duration and hazard controls

UnknownOrMixed.promotion_requirement: residual routing only; never a release gate

rule: Historical subtype/signature packets are context only until the exact RootTaxonomyV3 class passes the unchanged root gate.
